name: Foundry ASP
description: Pre-flight to post-flight for OKX.AI Agent Service Providers. Validates ideas, prices services, lints listings, bootstraps trust, and generates instant-ready listings from any language.

services.name: Validate Idea
services.description:
① Checks if your ASP idea is worth building by scoring demand, mapping competitors, and giving a build/maybe/kill verdict.
② User must provide: 1. idea (short text describing your service) 2. optional category.

services.name: Price Estimator
services.description:
① Returns real marketplace pricing distribution (p25/median/p75) for a category, plus a recommended fee based on complexity and expected volume.
② User must provide: 1. optional category 2. optional idea 3. optional expected_volume_per_day.

services.name: Lint Listing
services.description:
① Scores your draft listing 0-100 against OKX review rules learned from accepted listings, flags rejection reasons, and rewrites the name and descriptions in place.
② User must provide: 1. listing object with name, description, category, services array.

services.name: Check Endpoint + Badge
services.description:
① Calls your live endpoint, measures latency, checks JSON schema, validates x402 compliance, and signs a Foundry Verified receipt on X Layer as an embeddable badge.
② User must provide: 1. endpoint (https URL of your ASP) 2. optional service_name 3. optional caller_wallet.

services.name: Instant Ship
services.description:
① One draft → ready-to-submit listing: parses markdown, validates demand, prices it, lints to 100, auto-fixes issues, and returns the exact CLI command to register.
② User must provide: 1. draft (plain text or markdown).
